event.name: Perhaps there is a career in this
event.description: A day of sterling business. Jade from the docks to Veilgarden. Silk from Spite to the Palace. Secrets from everywhere to the Bazaar. A sudden disappearance when the auditors come around with their books and their permits and their gangs of neddy men. You are only at the edges of the vortex of commerce that is the Bazaar, but when the day is done you have... things. A bronze spinning top. Some bright blue rope. A brass lantern infested with evil snail things. You'll find a use for them.

possession.name: Persuasive
possession.availableAt: Persuasive improves as you attempt Persuasive tasks - you can improve it faster by spending Confident Smiles at your Lodgings.

messages.message: Persuasive has not changed from 230 because it's higher than 230.
messages.tooltip: 0 change points, 70 more needed to reach level 231.

messages.message: You succeeded in a Persuasive challenge! (Simple challenges mean you don't learn so much.)

possession.name: Certifiable Scrap
possession.description: Perhaps Mr Cups will recognise this as something delightful. When the Relickers appear, you'll be able to trade these Scraps for many things...
possession.availableAt: Get these from lodging cards and other opportunities around London.

messages.message: You've gained 4 x Certifiable Scrap (new total 1,892).
messages.tooltip: Perhaps Mr Cups will recognise this as something delightful. When the Relickers appear, you'll be able to trade these Scraps for many things...

possession.name: Penny
possession.description: One hundred pence makes an Echo. One hundred Echoes will purchase you a marvel or two at the Bazaar.
possession.availableAt: Sell almost anything at the Bazaar.
